title: IUSF against shortage of gas, fuel, medicine, food
body_lines: The Inter University Students Federation (IUSF) today staged a protest march from Lipton Circus to Fort Railway Station against the shortage of gas, fuel, medicine, and food. They urged the government to grant them some sort of relief. A group of protesters from ‘GotaGoGama’ in Galle Face Green also joined the protest. Pix by Nimalsiri Edirisinghe.
